analysis.consistency: High. The data fields provided align with standard D&D 5e spell formatting (name, level, school, casting time, range, components, duration, description, classes).
analysis.quality: High. The spell description is clear and mechanically sound, detailing area of effect, damage type (fire), saving throw (Dexterity), damage values (10d8), persistence conditions, and movement rules.

trigger_conditions: When a creature enters the spell's area for the first time on a turn
When a creature ends its turn there
mechanics.counter_condition: Wind of moderate or greater speed (at least 10 miles per hour) disperses it.
mechanics.movement: Moves 10 feet directly away from the caster in a direction chosen by the caster at the start of the caster's turn.
